title: Card A: Liquidity & Book Shape
headline: Binary spread 127.7 bps median (956x perp); TOB notional ~$108 USDC; OBI r=0.031 (weak); tick=1e-5; regime=WIDE_SPARSE

metrics.name: binary_median_spread_bps
metrics.sanity: Probability space 0-1; ~130 bps = 0.65¢ on $0.50 mid; sanity OK

metrics.name: bucket_median_spread_bps
metrics.sanity: Bucket wider than binary; extreme OOM-insensitive legs skew mean

metrics.name: perp_median_spread_bps
metrics.sanity: ~0.13 bps for BTC perp at $80k+; 1-tick spread; cross-check vs HL fee tier

metrics.name: binary_tob_notional_median_usdc
metrics.sanity: ~$117 median TOB; USDC-denominated; cross-checked against known small-desk fills

metrics.name: binary_within_100bps_notional_median_usdc
metrics.sanity: ~$713 median within 100 bps; 5-10 levels to reach; desk-tractable

metrics.name: binary_two_sided_fraction
metrics.sanity: Should be near 1.0 for active markets; check if 0 bid/ask artifacts present

metrics.name: obi_mean_spearman_r
metrics.sanity: Positive mean r (~0.03) but weak; n is adequate per symbol; no lookahead

metrics.name: binary_tick_size
metrics.sanity: 1e-5; verified from full price distribution; consistent with HL binary spec

metrics.name: spread_tte_mean_bps_lt1h
metrics.sanity: Mean widens near expiry due to noise/uncertainty; confirmed pattern

metrics.name: spread_tte_mean_bps_gt18h
metrics.sanity: Early-life spread narrower (less gamma, more price-following behavior)

mm_room.verdict: Wide-spread, shallow-depth binary book. A $1k–$25k desk can execute full TOB in one order. Join/improve at 1-tick improvement is viable (tick=1e-5). Sustained MM requires tiny position sizing (~$100–$500/side). Perp hedge is effectively unlimited at this scale.
